questions.prompt: A knight moves in which shape?
questions.explanation: The knight moves 2 squares in one direction and 1 perpendicular — forming an L. It's the only piece that can jump over other pieces.

questions.prompt: A white knight is on e4. Tap the square it can reach.
questions.explanation: From e4, a knight can reach 8 squares: d6, f6, c5, g5, c3, g3, d2, f2. f6 is one of them — straight up the file by 2 ranks, over one.

questions.prompt: How many squares can a knight reach from the center of an empty board?
questions.explanation: 8. A knight has up to 8 moves from the center, the most of any piece. From d4, e4, d5, or e5, all 8 are on the board.
